name: podcast-commerce-mcp
description: Podcast Commerce Intelligence MCP Server - Extract product mentions, score recommendations, and track trends from podcast transcripts. Built for the agent-to-agent economy.
author: Since Today Studio <team@sincetoday.com>

scripts.pretest: node -e "try { const db = require('better-sqlite3')(':memory:'); db.close(); } catch(e) { console.log('[pretest] better-sqlite3 binary mismatch — rebuilding...'); require('child_process').execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3', {stdio:'inherit'}); }"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
